arms_mandatory_baselines: target-task-family content-word token mass census denominator (pinned TinyStories-validation table, data/task-family-tinystories — pre-declared 2026-07-07, before this freeze)

dependent_vars.definition: content-word token mass of the pinned target-task table whose lemma is in the kernel vocabulary at this rung (deterministic membership census)
dependent_vars.name: n_covered

dependent_vars.definition: census denominator: FULL content-word token mass of the pinned table (1,709,765; the non-top-500 tail counts as uncovered — the conservative direction)
dependent_vars.name: n_tokens_total

n_planned.census: full deterministic census over the pinned table — no sampling, no annotators; count-based criteria carry no statistical test (P1 common rules); the seed record's 2000-token sampling + GATE-H spot-check + Wilson machinery were dropped WITH the sampling they policed (correction c-m0b-1)
n_planned.niche_scope_default: X = 20% of the target task family's content-word mass (pre-declared GNG-0 ratification default, P7 second-pass list; maintainer may reset X at GNG-0 signing)

endpoints.test: deterministic census fraction at the primary rung (molecules-v0) vs the pre-declared NICHE-SCOPE threshold X=0.20; count-based criterion, no statistical test (P1 common rules). Coverage here = surface form reachable in the kernel vocabulary today — a crude lower bound of judgment-based expressibility, stated as exactly that
per-rung census fractions (kernel-v0 / molecules-v0 / wn31-aligned); the wn31-aligned rung is the AxiomsOnly-reachable band and is never quoted as explicated coverage; descriptive

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: M0b has no P1 §4b row: coverage is corpus-indexed, not model-indexed. The measured coverage number extrapolates to NO other corpus or rung; it is restated verbatim with its rung in every later verdict (P2 G-7) and re-measured as the kernel grows (coverage-growth curve, P7 RT-11/§10).
kill_criterion_verbatim: P3 §1.1 m0b.gate consequence (RT-7, verbatim): 'coverage < X ⇒ every verdict template renders a NICHE-SCOPE banner and any frontier-pitch route must carry an explicit coverage-growth cost line — a gate with a consequence, not just disclosure.' Pre-declared default X = 20% of the target task family's content-word mass (GNG-0 ratification default, P7 second-pass verification list). FAIL here binds the NICHE-SCOPE banner; it does not stop Tier-1 (P1 §5: none of Tier 0 blocks Tier 1, but GATE-T1 requires m0b.close + m0b.gate evaluated).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

title: M0b — kernel-vocabulary coverage census + NICHE-SCOPE gate (P1 §5 required pre-experiment gate; deterministic on-box census, no annotators, per correction c-m0b-1; P2 G-7: the number every later verdict restates; not itself a hypothesis)
